_comment: Stage fingerprints for the battleResults file. Each signature is a byte sequence from the stage/enemy-definition region that is identical across all battles of that stage (any team, win or loss) and unique to that stage. To add a stage: capture 2+ battles of it (ideally 1 victory + 1 defeat with different teams), then run tools/make-signature.py to extract a distinctive run. Match is a raw substring search over the whole battleResults file. Longer/more-distinctive signatures first.

signatures.label: Dragon's Lair Stage 3 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED 2 disjoint teams (061119 + 061332) but FRAGILE: only 26b and tail is shared boilerplate. High re-derive risk as new content is added — re-run audit-signatures.py and re-derive if it collides.

signatures.label: Spirit Keep Stage 6 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams (060450 + 060627). 80-byte sig, unique vs all other dumps (audited).

signatures.label: Spirit Keep Stage 8 (Normal)
signatures._note: 145-byte enemy-script region run common to 3 SK8 dumps (132018 + 062636/062745), unique vs all others (audited). Teams likely similar across captures — re-verify with a clearly different team to confirm full team-independence.

signatures.label: Magic Keep Stage 6 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams (055631 + 055807). 154-byte sig, unique vs all other dumps (audited).

signatures.label: Force Keep Stage 6 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams (054638 + 054830). 122-byte sig, unique vs all other dumps (audited).

signatures.label: Void Keep Stage 5 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams (053721 + 054149). 74-byte sig, unique vs all other dumps (audited).

signatures.label: Arcane Keep Stage 6 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams (053101 + 053425). 152-byte sig, unique vs all other dumps (audited).

signatures.label: Spider's Den Stage 1 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED: 2 samples with fully disjoint teams AND opposite results (052541 retreat-defeat + 052753 victory). NOTE: original 74b sig false-matched Arcane Keep 6 (shared generic enemy-wave boilerplate 1f..e4005e); this 67b sig re-derived to exclude that collision. Re-audit when new dungeons are added.

signatures.label: Spider's Den Stage 3 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED across 2 teams (dumps 051657 + 051821), unique vs all others. Long (1213b) because the two teams shared 3 champs (Pelops/Staltus/Fayne), so the run includes their Spider-context data — a future run with a fully disjoint team could miss; add a 3rd sample if so.

signatures.label: Fire Knight's Castle Stage 5 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED team-independent: common to 2 samples across 2 different teams (dumps 051043 + 051326), unique vs all other dumps. Timestamp tail trimmed.

signatures.label: Ice Golem's Peak Stage 8 (Normal)
signatures._note: Re-derived from 5 runs (223819,042937,050151,063519,064129) after the old 27-byte sig failed to match fresh same-stage runs. This 115b run is from the enemy AI-script region (84 00...), stable across runs AND absent from IG7/IG9 — robust. Lesson: derive from the script region, validate across MANY runs, not 2-3.

signatures.label: Ice Golem's Peak Stage 7 (Normal)
signatures._note: VERIFIED team-independent: common to 2 samples across 2 different teams (dumps 223008 + 050651), unique vs IG8/IG9 and Dragon/Event dumps.
